charter.phase_name: V1.12AW CPO Branch Guarded Admission Review
charter.mission: Review whether the patched branch rows can move from review-only context into a guarded training-facing context without opening formal training or signal rights.
in_scope: reuse the four branch rows tested in V1.12AU and patched in V1.12AV
allow partial admission instead of forcing all-or-nothing branch promotion
success_criteria: the project can make a bounded branch-row admission decision
at least one branch row can be classified more precisely than review-only
the next lawful move becomes narrower than generic branch review

interpretation: V1.12AW converts the branch patch result into an admissibility decision instead of reopening generic geometry review.
This remains bounded, report-only, and non-deployable.
